current_record: 16-9 (overall) / 13-1 (Atlantic East, 1st place) — regular season finished February 2026

venue.name: Converse Family Fieldhouse
venue.notes: Marymount's primary on-campus athletics venue; the Rose Benté Lee Center also houses two gyms used by Saints programs

head_coach.name: Chris Rogers
head_coach.background: Entered his 17th season as Marymount's head men's basketball coach in 2025-26. Longest-tenured head coach on the Saints' current athletic staff.

postseason_2025_26.result: Finished 1st in the Atlantic East Conference regular season at 13-1. Postseason result not fully verified — d3hoops.com schedule listing ended at the Feb 26 Neumann loss and the available content did not confirm the AEC Tournament outcome.

sources.notes: Coaching staff including head coach Chris Rogers and assistants

verification_notes: ESPN does NOT publish a men's basketball team page for Marymount — D-III coverage is sparse, and the school is not listed in the ESPN mens-college-basketball/teams endpoint. espn_id is set to null and the daily cron will skip ESPN score fetches for this team (the `find_team_game` lookup will simply return None against the D1 scoreboard, which is the correct fail-safe). Primary recap data for Marymount will need to come from d3hoops.com or marymountsaints.com — a future enhancement may add a D3 fetcher; for now the team is listed so the persona/byline/KB infrastructure is in place. Postseason 2025-26 outcome unverified: regular season ended Feb 26 at home vs Neumann (L 68-75), the AEC Tournament would have followed, and Marymount entered as the 1 seed; final tournament result not confirmed from authoritative source content available at scrape time. Conference name 'Atlantic East Conference' confirmed; rivalries chosen from top-of-table AEC peers (Gwynedd Mercy was 2nd at 11-3).
